description_long: This is a modern upholstered chair with a rounded, enveloping backrest and integrated armrests, covered in a plush, velvety mustard-yellow fabric. The seat is generously padded, providing comfort and support, while the back and sides curve smoothly to cradle the user. The chair stands on four slender, black metal legs that angle slightly outward, giving it a stable yet elegant stance. The upholstery features a subtle mottled pattern, adding visual interest and a touch of luxury. The overall design is contemporary, making it suitable for stylish urban interiors such as cafes, waiting areas, or apartment living rooms. Its compact footprint and inviting form make it both functional and aesthetically pleasing.
description: A modern mustard-yellow upholstered chair with a rounded backrest, integrated armrests, and slim black metal legs. The plush fabric and curved design offer comfort and a contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, padded seat, curved backrest, and both armrests, with all four legs visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the chair's enveloping back and armrest, as well as the outward splay of the front and rear legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full curvature of the backrest and the mottled fabric pattern, with both rear legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the continuous curve of the back and armrest, and the slim profile of the legs.
